name: Create branch with auto-generated name
query: I made changes to auth.go that add user authentication. Create a new branch in my stack.
expected_behavior: Runs 'stackit log' to check current state
Checks README.md or CONTRIBUTING.md for commit message guidelines
Generates a conventional commit message with type prefix (e.g., 'feat:', 'fix:')
Validates message has clear description and follows format
Uses pipe format: echo 'message' | stackit create
Does NOT specify branch name (lets stackit auto-generate)
Runs 'stackit log' after creation to show new state
Does NOT use 'git commit' or 'git checkout' directly
anti_patterns: Manually specifies branch name when not requested
Skips validation of commit message quality
Uses 'stackit create -m' flag instead of pipe format
